title: Nagpur、Maharashtra — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Nagpur、Maharashtra的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Nagpur是Maharashtra的一个城市，人口约2,800,000。The geographic center of India, known for its oranges, tiger reserves, and as the winter capital of Maharashtra.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
